content.en:
The shattering of the dragon prison technique is just the beginning.

Any creature transformed into an ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon Clan will have a certain improvement, and these top emperor-level have actually accumulated enough for a long time, but they are bound by the Dragon Prison Technique, so they can't break through.

At this moment, with the blessing of the power of their families, they finally completed a breakthrough.

Rumble!!!

Dragon Shadow's cultivation has broken through, and he is transforming from an emperor level to an ancient demon level.

Of course, this kind of breakthrough is not without limitations, he has transformed into the family of the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, it is impossible to surpass the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, and he will not even be able to resist the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon clan.

If the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon falls, as a family, even if they don't die, they will be severely damaged, and their cultivation will be greatly reduced.

But the Dragons' tribe had known this for a long time and had already made a choice.

For them, they are bound to the Golden God Tribe for a lifetime, and they will never be able to break through to the ancient demon level, so it is better to take refuge in the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, at least they can break through to the ancient demon level!

Moreover, they were also optimistic about the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, this Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon was the pinnacle Ancient Demon level, and there was also hope of breaking through to the ultimate Ancient Demon level.

If Proz breaks through 257 and becomes the ultimate ancient demon level, then the dragon disciple tribe is truly developed.

And just after the Dragon Shadow, Long Chen also began to break through to the Ancient Demon Level, followed by Long Shu.

And the movement of these few people who broke through to the ancient demon level is too great, plus the dragon disciple tribe has been affected, and the whole clan is transforming into the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon Dragons clan.

Ye Tian's replica body was also a member of the Dragon Disciple Clan, and naturally it was also affected, and it was transforming into the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon Dragon's Descendant Clan at this moment.

"What's going on?"

"Moreover, there should be an emperor-level breakthrough to the ancient demon level, and there is more than one !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The situation of this dragon swallowing pool was beyond his expectations, and he shuttled through it with curiosity.

He knew very well that the change was in the place where the ancient demon-level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon was sleeping.

So, he went over and saw what was going on.

And not only him, but also some other emperors and kings were very curious, and some were very bold and went over to see it.

Wow!

Ye Tian rushed over and spied on the situation here.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian sensed the existence of an emperor-level, and several of them were transforming into ancient demon levels.

"That Ancient Demon Level Sky Devouring Demon Dragon has awakened, and its aura far surpasses that of other Ancient Demon Levels, it should be the peak Ancient Demon Level!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And these emperor level should be the emperor level of the dragon disciple tribe, but the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon did not attack the emperor level of the dragon disciple tribe, and several emperor level are breaking through to the ancient demon level.

Coupled with the changes in his body, he suddenly had a guess in his heart. 、

"The dragon disciple tribe has taken refuge in the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, and has become its dependent, and is transforming into the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragon's dragon descendant clan, and it is precisely because of this that these emperors will break through to the ancient demon level. But why did the dragon disciple tribe take refuge in the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, in this way, they would be completely limited by the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon!"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

If he knew the Dragon Prison Technique, he would know why the Dragon Disciple Tribe had taken refuge in the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon.

"Something big is wrong!"

Ye Tian knew very well that the Dragon Disciple Tribe had taken refuge in the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon, and the Dragon Disciple Tribe was in the territory of the Golden God Department and belonged to one of the tribes under the command of the Golden God Ministry.

Now, the Dragon Disciple Tribe has given birth to several ancient demon-level existences, and there may be ancient demon-level existences in the future, and they have taken refuge in the Sky Devouring Demon Dragon.

In this way, the status of the Golden God Department is seriously threatened, and a war with the Dragon Disciple Tribe will inevitably break out.

Even this matter will affect the Eagle Tribe, because if the Golden God Department wants to exterminate the Dragon Disciple Tribe, it will inevitably gather a large number of tribes to besiege the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

When the time comes, the Golden God Ministry forcibly requisitioned the emperor and king levels of the Eagle Ministry, so should the (AEBF) Eagle Ministry go?

If you don't go, you will rebel against the Golden God Ministry, and if you go, you will easily become cannon fodder.

Whatever the case may be, it's not a good thing.

......

Those ancient demon level didn't care about Ye Tian, after all, now that the dragon disciple tribe has been transformed into the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragon's descendant clan, Ye Tian's replica body also belongs to the Heaven Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragon's descendant clan, so naturally he will not be attacked.

But Ye Tian quietly retreated, he didn't want his duplicate body to be discovered, after all, his duplicate body was easy to see.

So, it's better to leave as soon as possible.

After that, Ye Tian annihilated the replica body, and the replica body from the outside world quickly withdrew, leaving the territory of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and bringing the resources on his body back to the Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian's copy body returned, and then he went to discuss the countermeasures with He Lao as soon as possible.

"He Lao, something big is wrong!"

Ye Tian said solemnly.

"What's the matter?" He Lao didn't know the situation yet, and he didn't have a dignified look, just a little curious.

Immediately, Ye Tian told the matter.

"Old He, there's something big going on over there in Long Swallow Pond!" Ye Tian said solemnly: "There is a peak Ancient Demon Level Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon sleeping over there in Dragon Swallowing Pond, and now the Dragon Disciple Tribe has taken refuge in the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon Clan, and has transformed into the Heaven Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragon Descendant Clan, and there are still several emperor-level existences who have broken through to become ancient demon level existences after the transformation. "

"How do you know?"

He Lao was shocked.

In his opinion, if he saw this scene, where could he come back alive, he would definitely be killed by an ancient demon-level existence!

"I knew it through a special method!" Ye Tian said, without explaining too much.

"You're really not wrong?"

He Lao asked solemnly.

Ye Tian replied affirmatively: "It's true!"

He Lao knew that Ye Tian was not very good at joking, if it was true, then the matter would be serious.

"If I'm not mistaken, that Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon should be the legendary Proz, the peak ancient demon level existence, but it disappeared in a long war, I thought it fell, but I didn't expect it to be in the Dragon Swallowing Pool. "

"It seems that the Dragon Disciple Tribe has cooperated with the Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon, this Sky Swallowing Demon Dragon should be asleep, but now that it has awakened, its injuries should have recovered. Now, the dragon tribe has transformed into the Heaven-Swallowing Demon Dragon Dragons, this must not be hidden from the Golden God Department, or it won't be long before war will break out!"

"He Lao, what should we do in the Eagle Department?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I don't know, but I can only assume that I don't know for now!" He Lao said.

Ye Tian also nodded, now he can really only think of not knowing.

Whether it's the current dragon tribe or the Golden God Department, it's not something they can offend, and the slightest mistake is the end of the destruction of the whole clan.
